data.body: Environment note: this OSError 75 was encountered in the Claude Code **web** environment (claude.ai/code), not a local install. The errno (EOVERFLOW — 'Value too large for defined data type') is characteristic of 32-bit/64-bit interface mismatches in containerized sandbox filesystems and may not reproduce in a standard local install. Reproduction in other environments (local CLI, IDE extension) should be verified before scoping the fix.
